description: 3 senior underwriters resigned simultaneously from the South zone Personal Loan desk, removing the bulk of senior credit-approval capacity.
Underwriter onboarding and training program suspended in South zone; remaining staff redeployed to clear the Personal Loan backlog.
Revised KYC documentation checklist rolled out for Home Loans.
Core banking system outage for 4 hours during scheduled maintenance.
Routine internal compliance audit completed with no major findings.
Planned retirement and succession of the Central zone operations head.
Quarterly refresher training completed for all credit officers.
Auto Loan interest-rate slab revised in line with central bank guidance.
New digital lending platform launched across the Northwest zone, enabling instant pre-approval and removing several manual processing steps.
Northwest zone completed an intensive underwriter upskilling program, lifting training completion above 90% and shortening processing times.
Organized fraud ring uncovered in the Southeast zone Business Loan portfolio; multiple falsified-collateral applications identified across branches.
Regulator initiated a special compliance review of the Southeast zone following the fraud discovery; several loan files frozen pending audit.
